raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against Citibank , N.A . regarding its failure to properly investigate and resolve unauthorized charges on my credit card account in violation of federal law. 
Nature of the Complaint This complaint is not about the merchant, but about Citibanks handling of my billing dispute and unauthorized

transaction claim. Citibank has failed to comply with its obligations under : Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ) Regulation Z ( 12 C.F.R. 1026.13 ) Background Two charges totaling {$2100.00} appeared on my Citi AAdvantage credit card account.

I reported these charges to Citibank as unauthorized transactions.

There was : No signed agreement No authorization No services provided No benefit received Citibanks Failures Despite receiving my written dispute, Citibank : 1. Failed to conduct a reasonable investigation 2. Failed to provide any evidence of authorization 3. Improperly required me to obtain documentation from the merchant 4. Relied on unsupported merchant claims instead of verifying authorization 5. Refused to fully correct the account despite lack of evidence Citibank has not produced : Any signed authorization Any transaction verification Any proof that I approved these charges Improper Handling of Dispute Citibank is treating this matter as a standard billing dispute, while failing to apply the required standard for unauthorized transactions.
